title: AgentOverview
description: Overview of the agent being reviewed in an Agent Governance Evidence Pack.

agent_name.description: The name of the agent being reviewed.

agent_description.description: A short description of what this agent does.

business_purpose.description: The business purpose this agent serves. Why does it exist?

owner.description: The business or technical owner responsible for this agent.

business_unit.description: The business unit that owns or operates this agent.

user_population.description: Description of the users or systems that interact with this agent.

lifecycle_stage.description: The lifecycle stage of this agent (e.g., pilot, production, deprecated).
